flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Aquinas College rose 11% between 2021 and 2024 ($36.1k → $40.2k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Aquinas College rose 11% between 2021 and 2024 ($36.1k → $40.2k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Aquinas College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (0.9% → 0.0%).

flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at Aquinas College rose 35% between 2006 and 2009 (24.6% → 33.1%).
